releaseNotes:
## ControlZebra v0.5.0-beta

- Windows beta release for v0.5.0-beta.
- Includes updated installer behavior to reduce file-lock install failures during upgrades.
- Includes update UI version-label formatting fix (`v0.5.0-beta` shown correctly).

Please report issues at https://github.com/ControlZebra/controlzebra-releases/issues
